title: Slow Days at Home: Cooking, Packing for a Special Trip, New Makeup Try-On and Event Night

questions.question: What does the speaker mean by 'two weeks in Bali'?
options: A) She will stay in Bali for two months
B) She will travel to Bali for two weeks
C) She just returned from Bali
D) She is planning to move to Bali
questions.explanation: 根据字幕'no, not two months, two weeks in Bali'，说话者明确纠正了时间长度，表示要去Bali（巴厘岛）两周，而不是两个月。

questions.question: What does the phrase 'hold close to my heart' mean in this context?
options: A) Keep physically close to my heart
C) Hold it tightly with hands
questions.explanation: 'Hold close to my heart' 是一个英语习语，意思是'珍藏在心里'，表示对某样东西或某个地方有深厚的感情。

questions.question: What does the speaker mean by 'editing' her clothes for packing?
options: A) Changing the colors of clothes
B) Selecting and narrowing down what to bring
questions.explanation: 根据字幕'I'm doing a first like I put everything I think I love and then I edit it'，这里的editing指的是从所有喜欢的物品中筛选、精简要带去的行李。

questions.question: What does the phrase 'really really old' emphasize?
options: A) The object is somewhat old
B) The object is extremely old
questions.explanation: 'Really really' 是程度副词的重复使用，表示加强语气，'really really old' 意思是'非常非常旧'，强调年代久远。

questions.question: What is the speaker planning to do according to 'I'm going to eat'?
questions.explanation: 'I'm going to eat' 是一个日常表达，意思是'我要去吃饭了'，通常指吃正餐（午餐或晚餐）。结合前面的 'It's lunchtime'，这里表示要去吃午饭。

questions.question: What does the speaker mean by '10 orders to go'?
options: B) 10 orders are remaining to complete
D) 10 orders are on the way
questions.explanation: 'To go' 在这里是'还剩、尚待'的意思。'10 orders to go' 意思是还剩10个订单需要处理完成。

questions.question: What does 'gorgeous' mean in the context of 'they're going to look so gorgeous'?
questions.explanation: 'Gorgeous' 是一个形容词，意思是'非常美丽的'、'绚丽的'，用于形容外观非常好看。

questions.question: What does the speaker mean by 'I love this' in this context?
options: C) I really like this thing
D) I want to buy this
questions.explanation: 'I love this' 是一个表达喜爱和欣赏的常见口语，意思是'我喜欢这个'、'我爱这个'，表示对某事物的正面情感。

questions.question: What is the speaker doing according to 'I'm definitely packing this'?
options: B) Putting clothes in a suitcase
questions.explanation: 'Packing' 在这里是动词，意思是'打包（行李）'。'I'm definitely packing this' 意思是'我一定要把这个打包带走'。

questions.question: What does the phrase 'as you can see' indicate in this context?
options: B) I'm about to describe something invisible
C) I'm directing your attention to something visible
questions.explanation: 'As you can see' 是一个引导短语，意思是'如你所见'，用于引导观众注意眼前可见的事物或画面。

questions.question: What does 'gifted me' mean in 'Summer Swim actually gifted me a two-piece'?
options: A) Sold to me at a discount
C) Gave me as a free gift
questions.explanation: 'Gift' 作为动词意思是'赠送'、'送给'。'Gifted me' 意思是'送给了我'、'赠送给我'，表示免费送给博主。

questions.question: What does the speaker mean by 'transformative year'?
options: A) A year with no changes
B) A year that brought significant personal changes
questions.explanation: 'Transformative' 来源于'transform'（转变、改变），意思是'变革性的'、'带来重大变化的'。'Transformative year' 意思是'转变的一年'、'发生重大改变的一年'。

questions.question: What does 'on the sides' mean in 'you basically can tie it up however you want on the sides'?
options: B) On the left and right edges
questions.explanation: 'On the sides' 指的是物体的两侧边缘。在这个语境中，是指衣服或行李在侧面可以按自己的方式系紧或调节。

questions.question: What does the speaker imply by 'a hard but extremely transformative year'?
options: A) The year was easy but changed nothing
B) The year was difficult but brought important growth
C) The year was boring and uneventful
D) The year was happy and relaxing
questions.explanation: 这个表达对比了'hard'（艰难的）和'transformative'（变革性的），暗示虽然这一年很困难，但带来了积极的个人成长和改变。

questions.question: What does 'keyhole' refer to in 'it has this keyhole'?
options: B) A small opening or design feature
questions.explanation: 'Keyhole' 原意是'钥匙孔'，在服装设计中可以指衣服上钥匙孔形状的设计细节，通常是领口或胸前的小开口设计。

questions.question: What does 'secondhand' mean in 'I buy most of little pieces of secondhand'?
questions.explanation: 'Secondhand' 意思是'二手的'、'旧的'，指已经被人使用过的物品。'Secondhand pieces' 指的是二手服装或配饰。

questions.question: What does the speaker mean by 'the melody of this music is so fresh but also nostalgic'?
options: A) The music sounds old and outdated
B) The music sounds new but reminds of the past
C) The music is confusing and strange
D) The music is very sad
questions.explanation: 'Fresh' 意思是'新颖的、清新的'，'nostalgic' 意思是'怀旧的'。这个表达描述音乐既有新意又带有怀旧感，是一种复杂的情感体验。

questions.question: Describe a special trip you have taken or would like to take. What makes it memorable for you?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语表达题，要求考生描述一次特别的旅行。题目基于视频中提到的Bali旅行内容，但考生可以自由描述自己的经历或愿望。
questions.referenceAnswer: 考生应提到：1) 旅行目的地 2) 旅行时长 3) 旅行中难忘的经历或活动 4) 为什么这次旅行对自己有意义
questions.hint: You can talk about: destination, duration, memorable moments, and why it's special to you.

questions.question: What does 'integrated skirt' mean in 'it's the one with the bodysuit and this like integrated skirt'?
options: A) A separate skirt that can be removed
B) A skirt that is attached as part of the garment
D) A skirt made of different material
questions.explanation: 'Integrated' 意思是'整合的'、'一体式的'。'Integrated skirt' 指的是与上衣连为一体的裙子设计，不是单独分开的。

questions.question: How do you usually pack for a trip? What are your tips for efficient packing?
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语题，要求考生分享打包行李的技巧和经验。视频中展示了博主打包去Bali行李的过程，考生可以借鉴或提出自己的方法。
questions.referenceAnswer: 考生应提到：1) 打包前的准备 2) 如何选择带什么 3) 整理技巧 4) 必备物品
questions.hint: You can mention: making a list, choosing versatile clothes, using packing cubes, etc.

questions.question: What does 'a package' refer to in 'I have got a package'?
questions.explanation: 'Package' 在口语中常指'包裹'、'快递'。'I have got a package' 意思是'我收到了一个包裹'，通常是快递送来的物品。

questions.question: Talk about a time when you went through a difficult period in your life but it eventually led to personal growth.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语题，灵感来自视频中提到的'2023 was such a hard but extremely transformative year'。考生需要描述一段困难时期以及如何从中成长。
questions.referenceAnswer: 考生应描述：1) 困难是什么 2) 为什么困难 3) 如何应对 4) 学到了什么/有什么成长
questions.hint: Think about challenges like moving to a new place, relationship changes, or career transitions.

questions.question: What does 'missing from the production' mean in the context of the video?
options: B) Lost or not available in the inventory
C) Not filmed for the video
questions.explanation: 'Missing from the production' 在商业语境中指的是产品缺货、库存缺失。'A full box is missing with one specific style and one specific size' 意思是某一特定款式和尺码的一整箱货丢失了。

questions.question: What does 'butter yellow' refer to in 'it's in black and butter yellow'?
options: B) A pale yellow color similar to butter
questions.explanation: 'Butter yellow' 是一种颜色名称，意思是'黄油色'、'淡黄色'，是一种柔和的浅黄色，类似黄油的颜色。

questions.question: What is your approach to shopping for clothes? Do you prefer buying new items or secondhand? Explain your preference.
questions.explanation: 这是一道口语题，基于视频中提到的' I buy most of little pieces here and there of secondhand'。考生需要表达自己的购物偏好和理由。
questions.referenceAnswer: 考生应提到：1) 偏好哪种购物方式 2) 为什么 3) 有什么优缺点 4) 实际的购物习惯
questions.hint: You can discuss factors like price, sustainability, style variety, and personal values.
